status: no_changes
reason: |
  The requested artifact-types loader already exists in cli/internal/artifacttypes/ with the required surface:
  - loader.go discovers plugin/workflow artifact types, honors package.yaml artifact_type_roots, caches results by on-disk mtime snapshots, and rejects meta.yml outside the plugin tree.
  - types.go normalizes discovered records into the requested Type and Index structures.
  - loader_test.go covers the new workflows/** shape, the legacy artifact_type_roots shape, mtime invalidation, and the outside-tree escape guard.
  The targeted package test suite and lefthook pre-commit both passed in this worktree, so there is no code change to make for this bead.
